theme: Telling a story using the STAR method

vocab.example: Start by describing the situation you were dealing with.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy bắt đầu bằng cách mô tả tình huống bạn đã gặp phải.

vocab.example: My task was to deliver the project within two weeks.
vocab.example_vi: Nhiệm vụ của tôi là hoàn thành dự án trong hai tuần.

vocab.example: I took action right away to fix the problem.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã hành động ngay để khắc phục vấn đề.

vocab.example: The outcome was that we finished two days early.
vocab.example_vi: Kết quả là chúng tôi hoàn thành sớm hai ngày.

vocab.meaning_vi: sắp xếp câu trả lời có cấu trúc
vocab.example: Try to structure your answer clearly using the STAR method.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy cố gắng sắp xếp câu trả lời rõ ràng theo phương pháp STAR.

vocab.example: Can you give a concrete example from your last job?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể cho một ví dụ cụ thể từ công việc trước không?

vocab.example: Try to quantify the result, like a percentage or a number.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy cố gắng định lượng kết quả, ví dụ bằng phần trăm hoặc con số.

vocab.meaning_vi: kể/giải thích chi tiết cho tôi nghe
vocab.example: Could you walk me through how you handled that project?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể kể chi tiết cho tôi nghe cách bạn xử lý dự án đó không?

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: Could you walk me through a challenge you faced at work?

lines.speaker: Minh (candidate)
lines.text: Sure, let me structure my answer using the STAR method.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: Great, please start with the situation.

lines.speaker: Minh (candidate)
lines.text: Our team faced a tight deadline for a client's release.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: I see. What was your task in that situation?

lines.speaker: Minh (candidate)
lines.text: My task was to fix the critical bugs before launch.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: What action did you take next?

lines.speaker: Minh (candidate)
lines.text: I took action by working with two teammates overnight.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: Can you quantify the outcome for me?

lines.speaker: Minh (candidate)
lines.text: The outcome was zero bugs, and we launched on time.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: That's a great concrete example, thank you.

lines.speaker: Minh (candidate)
lines.text: Thank you, I'm glad the story was clear.

questions.q: What method does Minh use to structure his answer?
What was the outcome Minh describes?
options: Zero bugs and an on-time launch

shadowing: Could you walk me through a challenge you faced at work?
Let me structure my answer clearly using the STAR method.
My task was to fix the critical bugs before launch.
I took action right away by working with two teammates overnight.
The outcome was zero bugs, and we launched on time.
